name: Backend CI/CD

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
    paths:
      - 'backend/**'

env:
  # 後端專屬環境變數
  ZEABUR_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.ZEABUR_API_KEY }}
  ZEABUR_SERVICE_ID: ${{ secrets.ZEABUR_SERVICE_ID }}

jobs:
  deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    defaults:
      run:
        working-directory: ./backend    # 切換到後端目錄

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Build Docker Image
        run: |
          docker build -t foodie_note-backend:${{ github.sha }} .

      - name: Deploy to Zeabur
        run: |
          curl -X POST https://api.zeabur.com/deploy \
            -H "Authorization: Bearer $ZEABUR_API_KEY" \
            -d '{"serviceId": "${{ env.ZEABUR_SERVICE_ID }}"}'
